Simulated Panel-Data Class

Source: R/sim_classes.R
FETWFE_simulated-class.Rd

S3 class for objects returned by simulateData(). Compact print method summarizes the panel's dimensions and cohort structure instead of dumping the full N*T x p design matrix (which the default print.list would do).

Developed by Gregory Faletto.

Site built with pkgdown 2.2.0.
